description: Dokumenten-Hub: Server-Modul + Frontend-View + Shell-Integration (Desktop + Tablet) + Tests
steps: Create server/modules/documents.mod.js following the pattern from server/modules/tasks.mod.js. Import utilities from ../kernel/util.js (bad, need, notFound, id, now, hhmm). Export default module object with name 'documents', title 'Dokumenten-Hub', version, description, and routes function.

Implement document CRUD: GET /api/documents (list, filterable by category query param), POST /api/documents (create with title, content as markdown text, category: one of briefing/lageplan/notfall/sonstiges, visibility: one of alle/management/lead), PATCH /api/documents/:id (update fields), DELETE /api/documents/:id (soft delete or hard delete). Documents have: id, title, content, category, visibility, pinned (boolean), createdAt, createdBy, updatedAt, updatedBy.
Implement pinning: PATCH /api/documents/:id with { pinned: true/false }. GET /api/documents returns pinned documents first.

Implement visibility filtering: When a non-management user requests GET /api/documents, filter out documents with visibility 'management'. When a non-lead non-management user requests, also filter out 'lead' visibility docs. Only 'management' can create/edit/delete. All authenticated users can read (respecting visibility).

Create web/js/views/documents.js following the pattern from web/js/views/kidsday.js. Export async function documentsView({ onCleanup, refresh }). Show: category filter chips (alle, briefing, lageplan, notfall, sonstiges), document list with pinned items prominent at top, markdown preview (simple rendering - just show raw text or basic formatting), create/edit dialog using sheet() from ../core/ui.js. Use imports: h, ic, badge, panel from ../core/dom.js; get, post, patch, del, act from ../core/api.js; on, store from ../core/store.js; sheet, toast from ../core/ui.js.

Register the documents view in web/js/shell/desktop.js: Add import for documentsView from '../views/documents.js'. Add NAV entry in the 'Planung' section: { id: 'dokumente', label: 'Dokumente', icon: 'doc', view: documentsView }.

Register the documents view in web/js/shell/tablet.js: Add it to the 'mehr' tab area. In the leadMehrView function, add a documents panel that shows pinned documents and a link to the full document list.
Add '/js/views/documents.js' to the SHELL array in web/sw.js for offline caching.

Add comprehensive tests to server/test/smoke.mjs in a new section 'Dokumenten-Hub'. Test: create document, read list, update, pin/unpin, delete, category filtering, visibility filtering (actor cannot see management-only docs), role restrictions (actor cannot create/edit/delete, gets 403), pinned docs appear first.
acceptance_criteria: GET /api/documents returns documents list filtered by visibility, pinned first
Category filtering via query param works
Visibility filtering works - actor cannot see management-only docs
Pinned documents appear first in the list
Frontend view renders document list with category filters and create/edit dialog
Navigation entry appears in desktop shell under Planung section
Documents panel appears in tablet shell Mehr tab
Service Worker cache includes the new view file
All existing tests continue to pass plus new document hub tests pass
verification: Run 'npm test' and confirm all tests pass including new document hub tests
findings: All 237 tests pass (216 existing + 21 new Dokumenten-Hub tests). Module auto-discovered from server/modules/ directory. Documents collection is auto-created by the db layer on first use. Visibility filtering works: management sees all, lead sees alle+lead, actor sees only alle. Pinned documents sort to top. Role restrictions enforced via { roles: ['management'] } on POST/PATCH/DELETE routes. Desktop shell entry added to Planung section. Tablet shell shows pinned documents panel in the Mehr tab.
